channel.title: React native
channel.description: Hi, I have a wordpress website and would like to create a mobile app using react native. Could anybody help me please?

item.title: React native
item.dc:creator: Pablo
item.description:
Hello @escaped.goat2207

I’m afraid Frontity Framework doesn’t fit your needs. Our framework is designed to build React Frontends using WordPress as a Headless CMS. We don’t give support for mobile apps or React Native at the moment.

After a quick Google search I’ve found this recent article that might help you https://medium.com/swlh/creating-a-react-native-app-with-wordpress-backend-b56f8dc1d21c but it has nothing to do with Frontity.

Good luck with your project!

Read full topic

item.title: React native

item.description:
Hi, I have a wordpress website and would like to create a mobile app using react native. Could anybody help me please?
